> **isMappableIdentifier**(`identifier`): `boolean`

Defined in: [packages/core/src/lib/utils/is-mappable-identifier.ts:12](https://github.com/nartc/mapper/blob/main/packages/core/src/lib/utils/is-mappable-identifier.ts#L12)

True when the identifier is a "real" model identifier (not a primitive or Date
constructor) — i.e. a candidate for nested (member) mapping.

`unknown`
